     5вҶ’
     6вҶ’# Develop Skill

     8вҶ’## м„ӨлӘ…
     9вҶ’
    10вҶ’мғҲ кё°лҠҘмқ„ к°ңл°ңн•  л•Ңмқҳ н‘ңмӨҖ мӣҢнҒ¬н”ҢлЎңмҡ°лҘј м•ҲлӮҙн•ңлӢӨ.
    11вҶ’
    12вҶ’## к°ңл°ң мҲңм„ң
    13вҶ’
    14вҶ’```
    15вҶ’1. Entity м •мқҳ       вҶ’ domain/.../entity/
    16вҶ’2. Repository мһ‘м„ұ   вҶ’ domain/.../repository/
    17вҶ’3. GraphQL Schema    вҶ’ graphql/.../resources/graphql/
    18вҶ’4. Proto м •мқҳ        вҶ’ protobuf/.../proto/
    19вҶ’5. Service кө¬нҳ„      вҶ’ {module}/.../service/
    20вҶ’6. gRPC Service      вҶ’ {module}/.../controller/
    21вҶ’7. GraphQL Service   вҶ’ graphql/.../service/
    22вҶ’8. GraphQL Controller вҶ’ graphql/.../controller/
    23вҶ’```
    24вҶ’
    25вҶ’## кі„мёөлі„ м—ӯн• 
    26вҶ’
    27вҶ’| кі„мёө | мң„м№ҳ | м—ӯн•  |
    28вҶ’|------|------|------|
    29вҶ’| GraphQL Controller | `graphql/controller/` | мҡ”мІӯ мҲҳмӢ , мқ‘лӢө мЎ°н•©, @PreAuthorize |
    30вҶ’| GraphQL Service | `graphql/service/` | @GrpcClientлЎң gRPC нҳём¶ң |
    31вҶ’| GrpcService | `{module}/controller/` | gRPC мҡ”мІӯ мҲҳмӢ , Service нҳём¶ң |
    32вҶ’| Service | `{module}/service/` | л№„мҰҲлӢҲмҠӨ лЎңм§Ғ, @Transactional |
    33вҶ’| Repository | `domain/repository/` | DB м ‘к·ј (JPA/QueryDSL) |
    34вҶ’
    35вҶ’## кІҖмҰқ
    36вҶ’
    37вҶ’```bash
    38вҶ’./gradlew :ліҖкІҪлӘЁл“Ҳ:compileKotlin
    39вҶ’./gradlew :ліҖкІҪлӘЁл“Ҳ:test
    40вҶ’```
    41вҶ’
    42вҶ’## мЈјмқҳмӮ¬н•ӯ
    43вҶ’
    44вҶ’- GrpcServiceм—җ Repository м§Ғм ‘ мЈјмһ… кёҲм§Җ (л°ҳл“ңмӢң Service кІҪмң )
    45вҶ’- GraphQL Controllerм—җм„ң Repository м ‘к·ј кёҲм§Җ (gRPC Service кІҪмң )

     7вҶ’## 1. Entity м„Өкі„ мғҒм„ё

     9вҶ’### ID м „лһө
    10вҶ’```kotlin
    11вҶ’// UUID кё°л°ҳ (кё°ліё)
    12вҶ’@Id

    14вҶ’@GenericGenerator(name = "uuid2", strategy = "uuid2")
    15вҶ’val id: String = ""

    17вҶ’// Auto Increment (нҠ№мҲҳн•ң кІҪмҡ°)
    18вҶ’@Id
    19вҶ’@GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.IDENTITY)
    20вҶ’val id: Long = 0

    23вҶ’### кҙҖкі„ л§Өн•‘

    25вҶ’// ManyToOne (к°ҖмһҘ нқ”н•Ё)

    31вҶ’@ManyToOne(fetch = FetchType.LAZY)

    40вҶ’### Enum л§Өн•‘
    41вҶ’```kotlin
    42вҶ’// DBм—җ м •мҲҳлЎң м ҖмһҘ

    46вҶ’// Kotlin enumкіј л§Өн•‘
    47вҶ’enum class UserStatus(val value: Int) {

    50вҶ’    BANNED(2);
    51вҶ’
    52вҶ’    companion object {
    53вҶ’        fun fromValue(value: Int) = entries.first { it.value == value }

    55вҶ’}
    56вҶ’```
    57вҶ’
    58вҶ’## 2. Repository мғҒм„ё
    59вҶ’
    60вҶ’### QueryDSL
    61вҶ’```kotlin
    62вҶ’interface CustomRepository {
    63вҶ’    fun findByComplexCondition(userId: String, status: Int): List<Entity>
    64вҶ’}
    65вҶ’
    66вҶ’class CustomRepositoryImpl(
    67вҶ’    private val queryFactory: JPAQueryFactory,
    68вҶ’) : CustomRepository {
    69вҶ’    override fun findByComplexCondition(userId: String, status: Int): List<Entity> {
    70вҶ’        val entity = QEntity.entity
    71вҶ’        return queryFactory
    72вҶ’            .selectFrom(entity)
    73вҶ’            .where(
    74вҶ’                entity.userId.eq(userId),
    75вҶ’                entity.status.eq(status),
    76вҶ’                entity.deletedAt.isNull,
    77вҶ’            )

    80вҶ’    }
    81вҶ’}
    82вҶ’```
    83вҶ’
    84вҶ’### Native Query
    85вҶ’```kotlin
    86вҶ’@Query("""
    87вҶ’    SELECT e.* FROM maum.entity e
    88вҶ’    LEFT JOIN maum.other o ON e.id = o.entity_id
    89вҶ’    WHERE e.user_id = :userId

    92вҶ’fun findWithoutRelation(@Param("userId") userId: String): List<Entity>

    95вҶ’## 3. gRPC м—җлҹ¬ мІҳлҰ¬ мғҒм„ё

    97вҶ’### м„ңлІ„ мёЎ (л§ҲмқҙнҒ¬лЎңм„ңл№„мҠӨ)

     6вҶ’# GraphQL Skill

     8вҶ’## м„ӨлӘ…

    10вҶ’GraphQL мҠӨнӮӨл§Ҳ м •мқҳл¶Җн„° Controller/Service кө¬нҳ„к№Ңм§Җмқҳ мӣҢнҒ¬н”ҢлЎңмҡ°лҘј м•ҲлӮҙн•ңлӢӨ.

    12вҶ’## мӢӨн–ү м Ҳм°Ё
    13вҶ’
    14вҶ’### 1. Schema м •мқҳ
    15вҶ’
    16вҶ’мң„м№ҳ: `graphql/src/main/resources/graphql/schema.graphqls` лҳҗлҠ” лі„лҸ„ `.graphqls` нҢҢмқј
    17вҶ’
    18вҶ’```graphql

    41вҶ’### 2. GraphQL Controller

     5вҶ’
     6вҶ’# gRPC Skill
     7вҶ’
     8вҶ’## м„ӨлӘ…
     9вҶ’
    10вҶ’Protocol Buffers м •мқҳл¶Җн„° gRPC м„ңл№„мҠӨ кө¬нҳ„к№Ңм§Җмқҳ мӣҢнҒ¬н”ҢлЎңмҡ°лҘј м•ҲлӮҙн•ңлӢӨ.
    11вҶ’
    12вҶ’## мӢӨн–ү м Ҳм°Ё
    13вҶ’
    14вҶ’### 1. Proto м •мқҳ
    15вҶ’
    16вҶ’мң„м№ҳ: `protobuf/src/main/proto/{лҸ„л©”мқё}/{service}.proto`
    17вҶ’
    18вҶ’```protobuf
    19вҶ’syntax = "proto3";
    20вҶ’package feature;
    21вҶ’
    22вҶ’option java_multiple_files = true;
    23вҶ’option java_package = "com.maum.backend.protobuf.feature";
    24вҶ’
    25вҶ’service FeatureService {
    26вҶ’  rpc GetFeature(GetFeatureRequest) returns (GetFeatureResponse);
    27вҶ’  rpc CreateFeature(CreateFeatureRequest) returns (CreateFeatureResponse);
    28вҶ’  rpc ListFeatures(ListFeaturesRequest) returns (ListFeaturesResponse);
    29вҶ’}
    30вҶ’
    31вҶ’message GetFeatureRequest {
    32вҶ’  string user_id = 1;
    33вҶ’  string feature_id = 2;
    34вҶ’}
    35вҶ’
    36вҶ’message GetFeatureResponse {
    37вҶ’  Feature feature = 1;
    38вҶ’}
    39вҶ’
    40вҶ’message Feature {
    41вҶ’  string id = 1;
    42вҶ’  string name = 2;
    43вҶ’  string user_id = 3;
    44вҶ’  string created_at = 4;
    45вҶ’}
    46вҶ’```
    47вҶ’
    48вҶ’### 2. Proto л№Ңл“ң
    49вҶ’
    50вҶ’```bash
    51вҶ’./gradlew :protobuf:clean :protobuf:build
    52вҶ’```
    53вҶ’
    54вҶ’### 3. gRPC Service кө¬нҳ„ (м„ңлІ„)
    55вҶ’
    56вҶ’мң„м№ҳ: `{module}/src/main/kotlin/com/maum/backend/controller/`
    57вҶ’
    58вҶ’```kotlin
    59вҶ’@GrpcService
    60вҶ’class FeatureGrpcService(
    61вҶ’    private val featureService: FeatureService,
    62вҶ’) : FeatureServiceGrpc.FeatureServiceImplBase() {
    63вҶ’
    64вҶ’    override fun getFeature(
    65вҶ’        request: GetFeatureRequest,
    66вҶ’        responseObserver: StreamObserver<GetFeatureResponse>,
    67вҶ’    ) {
    68вҶ’        val feature = featureService.getFeature(request.userId, request.featureId)
    69вҶ’        val response = GetFeatureResponse.newBuilder()
    70вҶ’            .setFeature(feature.toProto())
    71вҶ’            .build()
    72вҶ’        responseObserver.onNext(response)
    73вҶ’        responseObserver.onCompleted()
    74вҶ’    }
    75вҶ’}
    76вҶ’```
    77вҶ’
    78вҶ’### 4. gRPC Client кө¬нҳ„ (GraphQL лӘЁл“Ҳ)
    79вҶ’
    80вҶ’мң„м№ҳ: `graphql/src/main/kotlin/com/maum/backend/service/{лҸ„л©”мқё}/`
    81вҶ’
    82вҶ’```kotlin
    83вҶ’@Service
    84вҶ’class FeatureService {
    85вҶ’    @GrpcClient("feature-grpc")
    86вҶ’    private lateinit var featureStub: FeatureServiceGrpc.FeatureServiceBlockingStub
    87вҶ’
    88вҶ’    fun getFeature(userId: String, featureId: String): GetFeatureResponse {
    89вҶ’        val request = GetFeatureRequest.newBuilder()
    90вҶ’            .setUserId(userId)
    91вҶ’            .setFeatureId(featureId)
    92вҶ’            .build()
    93вҶ’        return try {
    94вҶ’            featureStub.getFeature(request)
    95вҶ’        } catch (e: StatusRuntimeException) {
    96вҶ’            throw CustomGraphQLException(e.trailers!!, e.status.description)
    97вҶ’        }
    98вҶ’    }
    99вҶ’}
   100вҶ’```
   101вҶ’
   102вҶ’### 5. gRPC мұ„л„җ м„Өм •
   103вҶ’
   104вҶ’`application.yml`:
   105вҶ’```yaml

   108вҶ’    feature-grpc:

   112вҶ’
   113вҶ’## Proto м»ЁлІӨм…ҳ
   114вҶ’
   115вҶ’| н•ӯлӘ© | к·ңм№ҷ |
   116вҶ’|------|------|
   117вҶ’| нҢЁнӮӨм§Җ | лҸ„л©”мқёлӘ… (мҶҢл¬ёмһҗ) |

   126вҶ’## н…ҢмҠӨнҠё л„Өмқҙл°Қ

## мҡ”м•Ҫ

Maum н”„лЎңм қнҠёмқҳ **UserService**лҠ” лӢӨмқҢкіј к°ҷмқҖ нҠ№м§•мқ„ к°Җм§‘лӢҲлӢӨ:

- **м—җлҹ¬ мІҳлҰ¬**: gRPC StatusлҘј GraphQL мҳҲмҷёлЎң л§Өн•‘
